visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A male host with short brown hair, wearing a light blue denim short-sleeved shirt over a white t-shirt, stands outdoors on an asphalt surface with green hills in the distance. He gestures energetically while speaking to the camera. (2) Sequential fast cuts display the exterior entrance signs of Hungkuang University, Nankai University, and Takming University of Science and Technology. (3) The host is seen on various campus grounds, including hallways and parking areas, interviewing young male and female students who wear casual everyday clothing. (4) The host sits near a red athletic track, holding a white paper bowl of noodles and using green chopsticks to taste the food, showing exaggerated facial expressions of curiosity and evaluation. (5) Short clips feature various students laughing and gesturing as they speak into a microphone labeled with a show logo. (6) The host walks down a paved campus sidewalk, drinking from a colorful paper cup with a plastic straw while continuing his narration. (7) The host returns to the track setting, finishing his noodles with a satisfied expression as a small portable fan is held nearby to cool him down.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Subtitle]: 我收集了最常被說. [Logo]: @yga0721. (2) [Subtitle]: 我們學校學餐很難吃的三間學校. (3) [Slogan]: 台中弘光科技大學. (4) [Slogan]: 南開科技大學. (5) [Slogan]: 德明財經科技大學. (6) [Subtitle]: 有這間炒飯. [Variety]: 嘎嘎調查局. (7) [Subtitle]: 但就.... [Variety]: 就便宜. (8) [Subtitle]: 滷味變好吃. (9) [Subtitle]: 吃完都會拉肚子. (10) [Subtitle]: 好像鴨血還豆腐有個塑膠味. (11) [Subtitle]: 拉麵很難吃. (12) [Subtitle]: 究竟是死鹹還是香. (13) [Subtitle]: 不到死鹹呀. (14) [Subtitle]: 甚至偏清淡!! (15) [Subtitle]: 有什麼特別的地方嗎. (16) [Subtitle]: 沒有. [Variety]: 沒有. (17) [Subtitle]: 許願有什麼什麼餐廳可以. [Variety]: 算了吧. (18) [Subtitle]: 那個校名先改. [Variety]: 不難開. (19) [Subtitle]: 酸菜白肉冬粉. (20) [Slogan]: 辣椒醬兩匙. 醋一圈. 胡椒粉一次. (21) [Subtitle]: 畢業之後還會再回來吃的那種. (22) [Subtitle]: 酸王蠻好吃的. (23) [Subtitle]: 酸王是？ (24) [Subtitle]: 酸菜白肉鍋王子麵. (25) [Variety]: 加辣不錯哦!! (26) [Subtitle]: 我覺得OK啊. (27) [Subtitle]: 是也不至於. [Variety]: 是也不至於.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main host, 10 unique interviewees across different campus locations, and 3 background passers-by.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: An energetic male host with styled brown hair, wearing a layered light blue denim shirt over a white tee.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The video features multiple campus environments: formal university gates, concrete parking lots, red rubber athletic tracks, and indoor academic hallways with glass doors.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) High-arousal male narration introduces the video topic over an upbeat, synthetic pop BGM. A bright 'ding' SFX punctuates the mention of 'three schools'. (2) A fast 'whoosh' transition SFX triggers as the scene shifts to university signs. The BGM maintains a steady, energetic rhythm. (3) Multiple short vocal clips from students are heard, featuring varied tones from shy murmurs to loud laughter. A cartoonish 'boing' SFX is used during a comedic remark about food quality. (4) The host's voice becomes slightly muffled as he eats, accompanied by the faint sound of chopsticks clinking against a bowl and light slurping. (5) A series of 'pop' and 'ding' sound effects are inserted rhythmically alongside the host's fast-paced reactions to student interviews. (6) A sharp suction sound occurs as the host drinks from a straw, followed by a playful, high-pitched vocal inflection. (7) The audio concludes with a final energetic vocal sign-off from the host, layered over a swelling BGM coda and a final 'ding' effect.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Comparative Interviews -> Real-world Tasting -> Final Verdict
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video aims to humorously investigate the reputation of poor-quality cafeteria food at three specific Taiwanese universities by contrasting student complaints with the host's own tasting experience, ultimately entertaining the audience through high-energy reactions and social commentary.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The content appears to be a self-produced investigative vlog focusing on public opinion rather than a paid product placement.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video's rapid editing pace and heavy reliance on social-media-native variety SFX make it highly engaging for a young, mobile-first audience. The host's persona is central to the comedic delivery.
